description_long: This is a medium-sized bird with a streamlined body and a long, slightly rounded tail. Its plumage is predominantly brown with lighter, almost white, markings on the throat and belly, and subtle speckling along the wings and back. The wings are compact and lie flat against the body, while the tail is a rich reddish-brown and extends straight out. The beak is slender, slightly curved, and pointed, suitable for probing or picking. The legs are short and appear to be a muted brown or gray color. The bird's overall appearance suggests it is adapted for life on the ground or in low vegetation, blending well with earthy urban environments.
description: A brown, medium-sized bird with a long reddish tail, speckled wings, and a slender, slightly curved beak.
description_view_0: Side view showing the bird's streamlined body, long reddish-brown tail, and pointed beak.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the bird's broad back, speckled feather pattern, and the full width of the tail.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same streamlined profile, with clear visibility of the underbelly and tail length.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the tail's shape and the symmetrical arrangement of the wings and back feathers.
attribute_plumage_pattern: Mottled brown with pale spots and streaks on the wings and back, lighter underparts, and a reddish tail
